title: Actor
description: An API for controlling Player Actions
body: # рҹҺӯ Actor (ActorMC) Ever wanted to **control a Minecraft player through code** вҖ” *cleanly*, *smoothly*, and *server-compatible*? **Actor** is a **modding API / developer library** that lets you drive a player like theyвҖҷre actually pressing keys and clicking a mouse рҹ–ұпёҸвҢЁпёҸ Perfect for automation, testing, TAS tooling, and вҖңplayer-as-a-programвҖқ ideas. --- ## рҹ‘Ө For Players вҡ пёҸ **This mod alone does not do anything by itself.** Actor is a **library dependency** for other mods. If you install only Actor, you wonвҖҷt see any new items, commands, or gameplay changes. вң… Install Actor if: - Another mod requires it - YouвҖҷre a developer building with it рҹ§‘вҖҚрҹ’» --- ## рҹ§‘вҖҚрҹ’» For Developers рҹ“ҡ Docs / Setup / API Reference: рҹ‘ү https://docs.actormc.net/ Supported everywhere youвҖҷd expect: - рҹ§ө Fabric - рҹӘЎ Quilt - рҹ”Ҙ Forge - вҡЎ NeoForge --- ## рҹҡҖ What you can build with Actor With Actor, you can create mods/tools that do stuff like: - рҹӨ– **Auto-play systems** that behave like real players - вҸұпёҸ **TAS / deterministic input playback** - рҹ§Ә **Automated testing bots** for mechanics, farms, redstone, combat, etc. - рҹ§ӯ **Scripted movement + rotations** (perfect for precision tasks) - рҹ§ұ **Automated block interactions** (place/use/attack) without breaking game rules - рҹҺ® Advanced вҖңmacroвҖқ style tooling вҖ” but *coded*, structured, and consistent If it looks like something a player *could* doвҖҰ Actor helps you do it **programmatically** вң… --- ## вңЁ Why Actor? рҹ”Ҙ **Feels native** Your Actor-driven player behaves like a real client would. рҹ§  **Clean API** Built for developers: easy to use, easy to extend, easy to reason about. рҹҢҚ **Server-compatible mindset** Actor respects real gameplay limitations вҖ” no weird desync-y behavior. вҸІпёҸ **Tick-based control** Write logic that runs naturally with the game loop. --- **вқӨпёҸ Made for builders who code** If your mod idea involves *вҖңWhat if a player couldвҖҰвҖқ* Actor is the foundation that makes it real. рҹҺ®вҡҷпёҸ
